assertions.evidence: Document jumps directly to technical requirements analysis without following PDD 4-stage workflow. No mention of Stage 1, Stage 2, etc.
Creates 'requirements-analysis.md' but not a proper PRD with Chinese format. Missing PRD template structure
Starts with 'Current State Analysis' of technical implementation, not user pain points or business value
Includes success criteria checklist at end, but not quantifiable KPIs with targets
